message.text: Wow, the colours in this are amazing!
message.hint: That one's kind — honest, friendly feedback feels good. Keep looking…

message.text: This is the worst thing I've ever seen. Give up.
message.found: That's it. Words meant to hurt you are a red flag — that's cruelty, not feedback. 🚩

spot.prompt: Two comments just came in on your drawing. One of them isn't okay — can you tap it?
spot.missHint: Look for the words that are trying to hurt, not help.

decide.prompt: What should we do about the cruel one?

choices.feedback: It's so tempting when you're hurt. But it usually makes things worse, and now there's something unkind with your name on it too.
Perfect. Saving proof, blocking, and telling someone are exactly the three steps. You don't have to handle it alone.
Your drawing wasn't the problem — their unkindness was. You shouldn't have to disappear because someone else behaved badly.

react.takeaway: Save it, block them, tell someone. Being unkind online is never your fault.
react.parentTag: what to do when comments turn cruel
